title: pelargonium × perryanum
intro: Pelargonium × perryanum, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium Roseum, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, characterized by its distinctive rose-like fragrance and delicate pink or white flowers. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × perryanum include its high concentration of geraniol, a natural antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compound. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce stress, alleviate anxiety and insomnia, and soothe digestive issues due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × perryanum include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
